member.name: T:GRC.Shared.Core.Models.Core.EtcFiscalYear
member.summary: Fiscal-year hours breakdown used in ETC export DTOs.

member.name: T:GRC.Shared.Core.Models.Core.EtcRankHours
member.summary: Consumed and remaining hours for a single rank within an ETC fiscal year.

member.name: T:GRC.Shared.Core.Models.Core.RecipientAssignment
member.summary: Lightweight recipient assignment used within export DTOs to carry email, optional name, and position (Manager / SeniorManager).

member.name: M:GRC.Shared.Core.Models.Core.RecipientAssignment.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Lightweight recipient assignment used within export DTOs to carry email, optional name, and position (Manager / SeniorManager).

member.name: T:GRC.Shared.Core.Services.ITabDelimitedExportService
member.summary: Exports tabular data as tab-delimited text files.

member.name: M:GRC.Shared.Core.Services.ITabDelimitedExportService.ExportAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}})
member.summary: Writes header and detail rows to a tab-delimited file at the specified path.
